channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Lola Young Performs Her James Blake Collab For The First Time Then Joins His Set At Radio 1’s Big Weekend
item.description: From debut to duet 🎶 Lola Young crushes her collab with James Blake at Radio 1’s Big Weekend! #MusicMagic

item.title: Robert Fripp Still Unsure Why Hospital Shaved His Balls After Heart Attack
item.description: Rock legend Robert Fripp's mystery: Hospital's surprise ball shave post-heart attack 🤘🔍 #RockNRollMystery #FrippFiasco

item.title: Girls Aloud’s Nicola Roberts Welcomes Her First Baby With Fiancé Mitch Hahn
item.description: 🎉 Congrats to Nicola Roberts on her new bundle of joy! 🍼💕 Sending all the love from the music fam! ✨ #GirlsAloud #NewBaby

item.title: Drake Becomes First Artist to Hold Top Three Billboard 200 Spots
item.description: 🔥 Drake dominating the charts like a boss! 🚀🎶 Who else is feeling the #DrakeVibes? 🌟 #ChartTopper #MusicNews

item.title: George Harrison’s Ex-Wife Pattie Boyd Says No One From Upcoming Beatles Movies Reached Out To Her
item.description: 🎸 Pattie Boyd speaks out on Beatles movies 🎥 Where's the love for the original Fab Four muse? #Beatles #MusicNews
